reviews.title: What Travelers Say About Our Service
reviews.1.d: I was worried about the long lines at Phuket airport, but booking this fast track service was the best decision. The rep met us right at the gate and we were through immigration in under 5 minutes!
reviews.2.d: Traveling with toddlers is hard enough, but bypassing the 2-hour customs queue at HKT made our family vacation start perfectly. Well worth the price!
reviews.3.d: As a frequent business traveler to Thailand, I use this VIP meet and assist every single time. It's incredibly reliable, even when my flight was delayed by 3 hours.
reviews.4.d: Seamless experience from start to finish. Communicating via WhatsApp was super easy, and the escort guided us straight to our private driver.
reviews.5.d: I read horror stories about Phuket airport queues. Paid for the premium arrival package, and the priority lane was completely empty. Saved us so much time.
reviews.6.d: My partner and I were exhausted after a 14-hour flight. Having a personal concierge navigate the terminal for us was a godsend. Incredible value!
reviews.7.d: Highly recommend booking this before your trip to Thailand. The staff was professional and handled all our bags while we breezed through passport control.
reviews.8.d: We messed up our arrival forms, but our escort helped us fix everything on the spot without losing our place in the VIP line. Absolute lifesavers.
reviews.9.d: The departure combo is purely magical. No stress at check-in or security whatsoever. It honestly felt like a true premium VIP service.
reviews.10.d: I was skeptical, but they actually deliver exactly what is promised. The lowest official price I found online and the execution was flawless.

faq.title: Phuket Airport Fast Track FAQ
faq.1.q: How fast is the VIP process?
faq.1.a: Under 5 minutes compared to standard immigration waits of over 60 minutes.
faq.2.q: How will I find my professional concierge?
faq.2.a: At the aircraft bridge (Arrivals) or Terminal entrance (Departures) holding a sign with your name.
faq.3.q: What happens if my flight to Phuket is delayed?
faq.3.a: We monitor all flights in real-time. If your flight is delayed, your VIP Fast Track escort adjusts their schedule automatically at no extra charge. In case of flight cancellation, you receive a full refund or free rebooking for your new flight date.
faq.4.q: Do I still need to fill out the Thailand TDAC form for 2026?
faq.4.a: Yes, all international travelers must complete the Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC) before arrival, regardless of Fast Track service. Our Phuket Airport Combo Package includes full TDAC assistance. We also provide a free step-by-step TDAC guide on our website.
faq.5.q: How far in advance should I book?
faq.5.a: We recommend booking at least 24 hours before your flight for guaranteed availability. Same-day bookings may be available depending on current demand. During peak season in Phuket (November–March), booking 48–72 hours ahead is highly advisable to skip the 2-hour lines.
faq.6.q: Is Fast Track available for all airlines at Phuket Airport?
faq.6.a: Yes, Fast Track service is available for all international flights at Phuket International Airport (HKT), operating 24/7 daily. This covers all major airlines including Thai Airways, Bangkok Airways, AirAsia, Singapore Airlines, Qatar Airways, Emirates, and more.

tdac_modal.title: Thailand Digital Arrival Card Guide
tdac_modal.p1: The official TDAC form (also known as TM6) is required for 2026 entry.
tdac_modal.scam_desc: The official portal is 100% free. Never pay for this form. Use ONLY tdac.immigration.go.th.
tdac_modal.step1: Register at the official portal 72h before landing.
tdac_modal.step3: Accurately input passport and flight TG/EK numbers.
tdac_modal.step4: Save the resulting QR code – you MUST show it on your phone.
modal.terms.title: Terms & Conditions
modal.terms.desc:
1. OVERVIEW OF SERVICES
Phuket Airport Fast Track (the "Agency") provides professional VIP Meet & Assist services at Phuket International Airport (HKT). Our services include Arrival Fast Track, Departure VIP, and Combo Packages designed to minimize wait times and provide seamless airport navigation.

2. BOOKING & CONFIRMATION
2.1 All bookings must be made at least 24 hours prior to service time.
2.2 A booking is only confirmed once full prepayment is received and a confirmation voucher is issued via WhatsApp, Telegram, or Email.
2.3 It is the passenger's responsibility to provide accurate flight numbers and arrival/departure times.

3. PRICING & PAYMENT
3.1 Prices are quoted in Thai Baht (THB).
3.2 Children under 12 receive a 50% discount. Infants (0-2 years) are free of charge.
3.3 Group rates apply for 2 or more paying passengers.

4. CANCELLATION & REFUND POLICY
4.1 100% Refund: If cancelled at least 24 hours before the scheduled service time.
4.2 100% Refund: If the airline cancels the flight and a new booking is not required.
4.3 No Refund: For "No-Shows" or cancellations made less than 24 hours before the service.
4.4 Amendments: Free of charge if requested at least 12 hours before arrival.

5. FLIGHT DELAYS & MONITORING
5.1 Our team monitors all HKT flight schedules in real-time.
5.2 If your flight is delayed, your professional escort will adjust their meeting time automatically at no extra cost.

6. PASSENGER CONDUCT & RESPONSIBILITIES
6.1 Passengers must possess valid travel documents (Passport, Visa, TDAC QR code).
6.2 Dress Code: Official HKT immigration zones require modest attire. Avoid sleeveless shirts or swimwear during processing.
6.3 The Agency is not liable for entry denial by Thai Immigration authorities for any reason.

7. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
The Agency acts as a facilitator between the passenger and airport authorities. We are not responsible for delays caused by official government processing, security checks, or airport infrastructure issues.
modal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
modal.privacy.desc:
1. DATA COLLECTION
We collect minimal personal data required to fulfill your VIP Fast Track service at HKT. This includes your Full Name, Flight Number, Passport Number (when required for official coordination), and Contact Details (WhatsApp/Telegram).

2. HOW WE USE YOUR INFORMATION
2.1 To coordinate your meeting point at Phuket Airport with our professional escorts.
2.2 To monitor your flight status for real-time adjustments.
2.3 To assist in filling out mandatory entry forms like the Thailand Digital Arrival Card (TDAC).

3. DATA RETENTION & SECURITY
3.1 All personal data is stored securely and is only accessible by the coordinating team.
3.2 Data Erasure: All sensitive travel data (flight and passport info) is permanently wiped from our systems 7 days after the service is completed.
3.3 Encrypted Communication: We exclusively use end-to-end encrypted platforms (WhatsApp and Telegram) for all status updates and personal info exchanges.

4. THIRD-PARTY DISCLOSURE
We do not sell or share your data with marketing agencies. We only disclose necessary details to official Phuket Airport authorities and our certified escort partners to ensure your fast-track processing.

5. YOUR RIGHTS
You have the right to request a summary of the data we hold or request its immediate deletion at any time prior to or after your service.
